# Repository description suggestion:

repository-description: "🎨 AI Skills Marketplace - Compare 10+ agentic coding tools, discover 50+ skills, find MCP servers, and choose the best AI coding agent for your workflow"

# To add topics:

1. Go to https://github.com/odykyi/agentic-comparison
2. Click the gear icon ⚙️ next to "About" on the right side
3. Add topics from the list above
4. Update the description
5. Add website URL: https://odykyi.github.io/agentic-comparison/
